sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, input_string String, hash_value FixedString(20));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog', RIPEMD160('The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog'));
SELECT id, input_string, hash_value FROM test_table WHERE hash_value GLOBAL IN (SELECT DISTINCT RIPEMD160(input_string) FROM test_table);
SELECT input_string FROM (SELECT input_string, RIPEMD160(input_string) as computed_hash FROM test_table) t WHERE computed_hash GLOBAL IN (SELECT hash_value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1);
CREATE TABLE temp_table (value String, number Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT RIPEMD160(value) AS value_hash FROM temp_table WHERE number > 0 AND value_hash GLOBAL IN (SELECT hash_value FROM test_table);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY input_string HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 AND RIPEMD160(input_string) GLOBAL IN (SELECT hash_value FROM test_table WHERE id > 0);
WITH RIPEMD160('') AS empty_hash SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE hash_value = empty_hash;
SELECT input_string, hash_value FROM test_table WHERE hash_value GLOBAL IN (SELECT RIPEMD160(input_string) FROM (SELECT input_string FROM test_table WHERE input_string != '') t);
SELECT DISTINCT id, hash_value FROM test_table WHERE input_string IN (SELECT input_string FROM (SELECT DISTINCT input_string FROM temp_table));
